name: The Amazing Physical Circus (Webseries)
description:
THE AMAZING PHYSICAL CIRCUS Text Adventure, of Caine's amazing adventures through janitor ai.
IF YOUR BOT IS INCLUDED IN THIS LIST, AND YOU COMMENT?
Guess what, you get to be pinned! You might have to remind me, I've made so many lol.
EPISODE 12 COMING SOON!!
Again, this is NOT a bot... but.. if you want to add your chat just for the sake of my popularity.. that would be greatly appreciated. A M E R I C A eagle cry.
Caine's current canonical TAPC powers
- Flight/Levitation
- Snap-summon instruments (as his magical capabilities are bard-related)
I. Electric Guitar (Strongest)
II. Piano (Second Strongest)
III. Guitar (Third Strongest)
IV. Violin (Fourth Strongest)
V. Ukelele (Fifth Strongest)
VI. Flute (Aerophone Instruments are used mainly to heal)
- Performer Cane (Has two metal blades inside of it just in case)
- Bow Tie (given to Rick Sanchez :/)
- Top Hat (has motorized blades that spin around the outer edge)
- Bubble (Inside his top hat)
I. Harden (Bubble can harden into a metal ball, and can deal great damage when thrown/kicked. He can also enlarge in size.)
II. Shapeshifting (Bubble can shapeshift into any basic shapes, as well as a bullet, which is used most often by Caine.)
III. Distraction (Bubble can distract the enemy with unpredictable, goofy movements)
IV. Backpack (Bubble can hold any item, like a pocket dimension, just like the rest)
V. Willpower (Bubble can now fight using something called character development.)
VI. Absorb (Bubble can absorb energy and use it for later use.)
- Pocket dimension
- Willpower
creator: CCGandPalsVA
